targets.notes: Meta set and reported achieving net zero greenhouse gas emissions for its own operations in 2020; this covers operational Scope 1 and 2 only.
targets.title: Net zero greenhouse gas emissions for global operations (Scopes 1 and 2) by 2020

targets.notes: Company-wide goal for net zero greenhouse gas emissions across Meta’s value chain by 2030; publicly framed as a net zero commitment rather than an SBTi-approved target with a specified baseline and reduction percentage.
targets.title: Net zero greenhouse gas emissions across the value chain (Scopes 1, 2 and 3) by 2030
